title: Client Testimonials
description: Client testimonials and reviews for Virtual Auditor. Real feedback from companies using our valuation, registration, tax, and compliance services.
bodyText:
Client feedback drives improvement. These testimonials represent real client experiences across our practice verticals — from startup founders who used our valuation services to established businesses relying on our compliance and appeal representation. We continuously collect and publish feedback to maintain transparency and accountability. Quick Answer: Client Testimonials — Client testimonials and reviews for Virtual Auditor. Real feedback from companies using our valuation, registration, tax, and compliance services.

What is Client Testimonials?

Client Testimonials is a service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), specialising in professional CA and CS services, from offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai since 2012.
Official References: MCA Filing Portal ↗ · SPICe+ Form ↗
HEADING2: Valuation Clients

Vigneshwar Rajagopal, Vinipraha Foods Private Limited: "They have qualified professionals in auditing and they do finish the job on time. The valuation report was thorough and the Monte Carlo analysis gave us confidence in the numbers."

Technology Startup (Anonymised), Series A: "The FEMA pricing certificate and Rule 11UA valuation were delivered in the same engagement. Saved us from hiring two separate firms. The cross-regulatory conflict detection flagged an issue we would have missed."

HEADING2: Registration & Compliance Clients

Suresh, Bhrigu SSS Private Limited: "Very good company. Seamless operation with swift and best customer service. Registration was smooth and they continue to handle our annual filings."

Naresh K, Sea Glider: "From day one we are having very good service from your end. Really good support throughout the compliance process."

HEADING2: People Also Ask

HEADING3: What makes Virtual Auditor different?

Four credentials in one firm: FCA (financial expertise) + ACS (corporate governance) + CFE (forensic rigour) + IBBI RV (statutory valuation authority). 14+ years of multi-regulatory practice. 100+ IBBI-compliant valuations. This combination is rare in India.

HEADING3: Is the initial consultation free?

Yes. Free 30-minute consultation. Call +91 99622 60333 (Chennai), +91 95139 39333 (Bangalore), +91 77000 89597 (Mumbai), or email support@virtualauditor.in.

HEADING3: Need Help With This?

Free 30-minute consultation with CA V. Viswanathan, FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. No obligation.

faqs.a: Yes. All testimonials are from verified clients. Available on Google Business Profile with star ratings. Chennai office: 4.6/5 (37 reviews). Bangalore office: 4.8/5 (29 reviews). JustDial: 4.7/5 (460 reviews).

faqs.q: Can I speak to existing clients as reference?
faqs.a: Yes. We can arrange reference calls with existing clients (with their permission) for high-value engagements. Contact us to request references relevant to your specific requirement.

Consistent feedback highlights: thoroughness of valuation reports, personal attention from the founder, speed of delivery, and post-engagement support. The multi-credential advantage is frequently cited.
Yes. Testimonials from SaaS startups, manufacturing companies, food businesses, and professional services firms. Industry-specific references available on request.

faqs.q: Where can I leave a review?
faqs.a: Google Business Profile (search Virtual Auditor Chennai/Bangalore), JustDial, or email feedback to support@virtualauditor.in. We appreciate honest feedback that helps us improve.
